description: Applies a stacked pipeline of visual post-processing effects to a video frame batch. Effects are executed in order: (1) colour grade via brightness/contrast/saturation, (2) Gaussian blur, (3) radial vignette, (4) additive film grain, (5) temporal speed ramp. All effects are pure-NumPy and require no additional dependencies beyond PyTorch. Set any value to its default/zero to disable that effect.
